text: I enjoyed some delicious bbq last night for dinner. I had some burnt ends and smoked ribs. I also enjoyed some delicious baked beans cole slaw and rolls.

Yesterday I cooked a good homemade dinner for myself. I am frustrated because I am eating less and eating healthy but not losing weight. The food was really delicious and nuroushing though, so it made me happy.

yesterdays work was very good. my team made a lot of breakthrough. there was this excietment and joy within us cause there was a project we have been working on for a while and it came out so much successful.
The other thing I did yesterday was work. It was a normal work day, but I was fairly busy. I wasn't too excited about the projects I was working on, but I was able to make progress on them.
I couldnt find much worrk online.Being in pain made the idea of working even worse.
